meta_description: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link from DaNangTrip.
title: Forgot password?
subtitle: Enter your registered email address to receive a recovery link.
welcome_subtitle: We will help you regain access quickly and securely.

success.title: Recovery email sent!

success.resend_success_toast: Recovery email has been resent successfully!

failure.general_error: An error occurred during processing. Please try again later.
